title: lathyrus nevadensis var. nuttallii
intro: Lathyrus nevadensis var. nuttallii, also known as Nuttall's lathyrus, is a plant species belonging to the pea family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating urinary tract infections, and alleviating symptoms of kidney stones. The herbal preparations of Lathyrus nevadensis var. nuttallii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although it is essential to note that more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential side effects.
